sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ فِي الْجَمَاعَةِ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ شَعَائِرِ الْإِسْلَامِ الَّتِي حَثَّ عَلَيْهَا النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ حَثًّا بَلِيغًا.
sentences.translation: Namaz u džematu jedan je od najvećih islamskih obreda kojeg je Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, snažno poticao.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer in congregation is one of the greatest Islamic rites, which the Prophet, peace be upon him, strongly encouraged.

sentences.arabic: فَقَدْ رَوَى عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُمَا أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ: «صَلَاةُ الْجَمَاعَةِ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ صَلَاةِ الْفَذِّ بِسَبْعٍ وَعِشْرِينَ دَرَجَةً» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَذَانِ].
sentences.translation: Abdullah ibn Omer, radijallahu anhuma, prenosi da je Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao: 'Namaz u džematu bolji je od namaza pojedinca za dvadeset i sedam stepeni.'
sentences.translationEn: Abdullah ibn Umar, may Allah be pleased with them both, reported that the Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Prayer in congregation is superior to prayer alone by twenty-seven degrees.'

sentences.arabic: وَهَذَا الْفَضْلُ الْعَظِيمُ يُبَيِّنُ أَهَمِّيَّةَ اجْتِمَاعِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ فِي الْمَسَاجِدِ خَمْسَ مَرَّاتٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi ga Buhari u Knjizi ezana.] Ova velika odlika ukazuje na važnost skupljanja muslimana u džamijama pet puta dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: [Recorded by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Adhan.] This tremendous virtue highlights the importance of Muslims gathering in mosques five times every day.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَاةُ الْجَمَاعَةِ تُقَوِّي الرَّابِطَةَ الْأُخُوِّيَّةَ بَيْنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَتُوَحِّدُ صُفُوفَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Namaz u džematu jača bratsku vezu između vjernika i ujedinjuje njihove redove.
sentences.translationEn: Congregational prayer strengthens the bonds of brotherhood among believers and unites their ranks.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنَ الْعُلَمَاءِ مَنْ ذَهَبَ إِلَى أَنَّ الصَّلَاةَ فِي الْجَمَاعَةِ فَرْضُ عَيْنٍ عَلَى الرِّجَالِ الْقَادِرِينَ، وَهُوَ مَا اخْتَارَهُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ بَازٍ رَحِمَهُ اللهُ.
sentences.translation: Neki učenjaci smatraju da je namaz u džematu farz ajn za muškarce koji su sposobni, što je i mišljenje šejha Ibn Baza, rahimehullah.
sentences.translationEn: Some scholars hold that it is an individual obligation upon capable men, which was also the view of Sheikh Ibn Baz, may Allah have mercy on him.

sentences.arabic: وَتَرْكُ الْمُسْلِمِ لِلْمَسْجِدِ مِنْ غَيْرِ عُذْرٍ شَرْعِيٍّ يَدُلُّ عَلَى ضَعْفِ الِاهْتِمَامِ بِهَذِهِ الشَّعِيرَةِ الْعَظِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ostavljanje džamije bez šerijatskog opravdanja ukazuje na slabo zanimanje za ovaj veliki obred.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim who abandons the mosque without a legitimate excuse shows little regard for this great rite.

sentences.arabic: فَيَنْبَغِي لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يُحَافِظَ عَلَى صَلَاةِ الْجَمَاعَةِ وَأَنْ يُشَجِّعَ أَهْلَهُ عَلَيْهَا، لِأَنَّهَا مِنْ أَسْبَابِ اجْتِمَاعِ كَلِمَةِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَوَحْدَتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Stoga je vjerniku obaveza da redovito klanja u džematu i da potiče svoju porodicu na to, jer je to jedan od uzroka sloge i jedinstva muslimana.
sentences.translationEn: The believer should therefore consistently attend congregational prayer and encourage his family to do so, for it is one of the means of unity and solidarity among Muslims.
